data.body: 🎉 LANDED: all 6 config-prune changes MERGED to origin/main (560180461..1131b491b) via a single Gerrit Submit of the relation-chain top (663), which submitted all ancestors atomically. Commits: 9b933e6c2 c366, a78ea15a3 28f1, 808643185 4cdf, 9a76e0ecd 7ed9, c4d58a306 d6bd, 1131b491b 5566. Config-prune HALF of epic cummy-monkeyish-dassie COMPLETE: 6 stories implemented under held-out TDD + closed with signed completion verdicts + landed. Epic 8d27 remains OPEN (correct) pending its deferred 7th child, the identity story 297d. Per ADR 0047, post-merge branch CI on the GitHub mirror is the safety net. NEXT PHASE per user directive: the identity subtree (297d + 7 tasks), escalating for AWS SSM + GitHub Actions secret provisioning.
